title: Friends: We were exploited
summary: Friends: We were exploited Wasilla church sued By S.J. KOMARNITSKY Daily News Mat-Su Bureau PALMER - Marion Sands is a kind, generous woman who has helped many people emotionally and financially. But, a string of former friends and fellow churchgoers told a jury Wednesday, she also exploits people, using an uncanny ability to insinuate herself into their lives and control them. "I was a puppet on a string," said Pennie Muth, who described Sands as a manipulative woman who used Muth's belief in the Lord to force her to do things that at times hurt her family. Muth lived with Sands and her husband and went to the same church in the early 1980s. She described staying up all night to clean her house to impress Sands and arguing with her husband over whether to sell the family's herd of dairy c…

title: Copyright © 1998 The Anchorage Daily News
summary: Renown Charters & Tours operates daily-year round-in the beautiful waters of Resurrection Bay out of Seward. On their Winter Wildlife & Glacier Cruises they regularly see Orca Whales, Porpoises, Sea Lions, Sea Otters, Bald Eagles and Bear Glacier! The boat has a heated cabin, allowing for a comfortable cruise even in the middle of winter. Transportation packages available from Anchorage or the Alyeska Prince Hotel. Call 907-272-1961 for more information or to make reservations. renown@alaska.net http://www.RenownCharters.com

title: Bus driver cited in fatal crash
summary: Bus driver cited in fatal crash By KAREN AHO Daily News reporter Police have cited a school bus driver for a traffic violation in connection with a January accident that killed another driver. Arthur Lariviere, 52, will not face criminal charges in the death of 16-year-old Alford Kennedy, police said. Lariviere was driving a Laidlaw school bus west on Northern Lights Boulevard when he turned left onto a side street without yielding, police said. Kennedy, driving east on his way to school, struck the bus going 58 mph in a 40 mph zone, police said. The accident happened at 8:30 a.m. on Jan. 7, and it was dark out and icy, police said. The front of Kennedy's 1982 Chrysler LeBaron struck the bus's rear axle. Kennedy, an honors student at Benny Benson Secondary School, was pronounced dead at Pr…
